pi_items.source: task.json and export_result.sh explicitly specify this path as the expected location for the output XML file.
The bundled data in data/fdsn/noto_earthquake.xml corresponds to the real 2024 Noto Peninsula, Japan Earthquake (USGS event ID us6000m0xl).
verifier.py applies this tolerance when comparing the exported coordinates with the database ground truth.
verifier.py applies this tolerance when comparing the exported magnitude with the database ground truth.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real earthquake data (the 2024 Noto Peninsula, Japan Earthquake, USGS event us6000m0xl) pre-loaded into a local SeisComP database. The agent must export this event to a QuakeML 1.2 XML file at '/home/ga/exports/noto_quakeml.xml'. The verification logic relies on dynamically extracting ground truth values from the database and allows a coordinate tolerance of 1.0 degrees and a magnitude tolerance of 0.5.
